violations.description: Hardcoded routing strings used directly in test navigation
violations.suggestion: Move routes/URLs into a unified config file or route enum to prevent failures when pages are moved.

violations.suggestion: Prefix titles with 'Given... When... Then...' to align with the BDD Format best practices.

summary: High maintainability score. The file structure is clean, utilizes descriptive block groupings, and is kept well under the 300-line soft limit (131 lines total). Only minor style/naming low-severity issues were found.
